paper_meta.Paper_title: Biotech   Bioengineering - 2020 - Menacho‐Melgar - Improved two‐stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: After cell harvest, addition of Triton X-100 and a freeze-thaw cycle results in protein release.

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: Lysis buffer contained Triton X-100; after lysis, samples were centrifuged and fluorescence readings were performed.

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: Cells were resuspended in lysis/hydrolysis buffer with Triton X-100; samples were clarified by centrifugation and analyzed by gel electrophoresis.

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: For microtiter plate autolysis, lysis buffer was added, lysates were clarified by centrifugation, and lysate was analyzed for GFPuv levels.

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: Cell pellets were washed in PBS and Triton X-100 was added; GFP release was measured by centrifugation and fluorescence.

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: Autolysis/hydrolysis in microtiter plates was described as useful for screening proteins in crude lysates and proteins purified from crude lysates.

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: “Triton X-100 ... triggers cell lysis”; “autolysis/hydrolysis protocol”; compatible with capillary electrophoresis systems
